title: CrabCraft
description: A collection of mods to increase the immersion of the game on community servers
body:
This modpack focuses on expanding the game of Minecraft without making it feel too different.

It was has been developed for a private minecraft server, but feel free to use it for your own game too!

Get out there, collect some cool things to decorate your hosue with, and enjoy the immersively fun and difficult world of CrabCraft!
